calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DANE T. JONES of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, Tel No. (415) 362-2580 appearing telephonically for Defendants Aesthetic Dental Center of Union Square and Evangeline Amores, DDS;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AESTHETIC DENTAL CENTER OF UNION SQUARE AND EVANGELINE AMORES, D.D.S.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Defendants met their initial burden by submitting evidence establishing that the complaint is barred by the statute of limitations and that Defendants met the requisite standard of care. (Defendants' Undisputed Material Facts 1-28.) PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Set For Trial On Apr-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
